items.title: gittensor-hub:wanted — Make landing/marketing routes public (proxy allowlist)
items.body:
Parent epic: #251

See issue body on GitHub — keep this backlog title stable for wanted-buffer dedupe.

items.title: gittensor-hub:wanted — Landing hero: brand + one headline + one supporting line + CTA group

gittensor-hub:wanted — Weekly /changelog page + first ship note
items.body:
## Goal
Add `/changelog` listing weekly ship notes.

## Acceptance
- Public route
- At least one real entry
- Documented how maintainers add the next note
